overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. The player character navigates from open streets lined with holographic billboards and towering skyscrapers, ascends to a covered pedestrian walkway featuring a vibrant purple food stall, and emerges at a busy intersection with traffic lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal massive skyscrapers and floating billboards against the night sky
pedestrian in orange jacket crosses the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking up the street while looking up at towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket walking across the street from right to left

entered.detail: tall building with prominent red neon Fuyutsuki signage near the top
massive curved digital screen displaying animated advertisements with teal and pink colors
safety railing with orange paint along the left side of the street
tall palm tree trunk visible against the building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at night, with the camera walking forward and panning up to reveal massive skyscrapers covered in neon signage. The Fuyutsuki tower dominates the center view with its red neon sign, while large digital billboards glow on the right. A pedestrian in an orange jacket crosses the street as the camera continues walking along the asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with graffiti-covered walls and street-level commercial buildings

events.description: camera turns right to follow the sidewalk path
red car drives past on the street moving away from the camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and observing street level shops and graffiti art

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving down the street away from the camera

entered.detail: multi-story building with blue neon Hotel sign on the facade
blue concrete wall covered in colorful street art and murals
tall metal pole with bright overhead street lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves to sidewalk level, passing a blue graffiti-covered wall on the left and a hotel building with neon signage. The street light pole becomes a central reference point as the camera turns slightly right. A red car drives past on the street, and various pedestrians walk along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway leading to upper pedestrian level with neon-lit food stall

events.description: ascending concrete stairs into a covered pedestrian walkway area
approaching a brightly lit purple neon food stall at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to upper level while passing a woman in red outfit descending

notable_agents.action: woman in red bodysuit walking down the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide staircase with metal railings leading upward to an elevated walkway
food counter with bright purple neon underlighting and traditional paper lanterns hanging above
massive concrete overpass or bridge structure spanning above the area

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase into a semi-covered area. A woman in a red outfit descends the stairs passing the camera. At the top, a vibrant purple food stall with glowing neon and paper lanterns comes into view on the right, situated under a massive concrete overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with blue fluorescent lighting and digital advertisements

events.description: passing groups of pedestrians walking in both directions through the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway passing various pedestrians and digital advertisements

entered.detail: tall vertical digital poster display with illuminated screen showing advertisements
rows of bright blue fluorescent tube lights lining the ceiling of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving through a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by blue fluorescent ceiling lights. The path is lined with digital advertising kiosks on the left. The massive concrete overhead structure now dominates the right side of the frame as the camera progresses forward through moderate pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with traffic signals and pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into an open urban intersection
approaching traffic light showing red signal at crosswalk

agents.ego_description: emerging from the covered walkway and approaching a crosswalk at a busy intersection with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of people waiting at the crosswalk near the traffic light

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt road surface
cluster of red and blue neon signs on buildings across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into a wide open intersection. A traffic light showing red stands on the right, while pedestrians gather at the crosswalk. White striped crosswalk markings lead across the asphalt, and distant buildings display bright neon signage against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a towering neon-lit city street into a sheltered pedestrian corridor before emerging at a bustling urban intersection. It begins on an asphalt road, panning up to reveal massive skyscrapers and the red glow of the Fuyutsuki tower before moving toward the sidewalk past graffiti-covered walls and passing hotels. As the camera turns right, it ascends a wide concrete staircase past a woman in red, shifting from the open street into a semi-covered area featuring a vibrant purple food stall with glowing lanterns. The scene then progresses through a pedestrian walkway illuminated by blue fluorescent ceiling lights and lined with digital kiosks, with a massive concrete overpass dominating the right side of the frame. Finally, the camera emerges from the shelter into a wide open intersection, passing a red traffic light and white striped crosswalks under the bright neon signage of the distant night skyline.
